response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including Python, JavaScript, C++, D), and a proven track record in scalable systems and open-source tooling, but lacks explicit evidence of building enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth frameworks as required — his AI exposure is limited to agent infrastructure, and experimentation experience is implied but not demonstrated.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, and DLang in high-throughput systems
Proven ability to build and ship open-source infrastructure tools used by real-world teams (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through workshops, mentoring, and cross-team contributions
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems
AI experience is tangential (AI agents) rather than focused on AI-driven experimentation or decision systems
Lacks clear metrics or outcomes showing impact on cross-team scalability or rollout automation
